item.title: Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoreusbdrive1
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Download Memory Card Restore program from www.restoreusbdrive.com site that is used to revive suddenly misplaced memorable photographs, mp3, mp4 songs, digital snaps, audio, video clippings etc from corrupted memory cards in simplified way.
[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Download Memory Card Restore program from www.restoreusbdrive.com site that is used to revive suddenly misplaced memorable photographs, mp3, mp4 songs, digital snaps, audio, video clippings etc from corrupted memory cards in simplified way.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Download Memory Card Restore program from www.restoreusbdrive.com site that is used to revive suddenly misplaced memorable photographs, mp3, mp4 songs, digital snaps, audio, video clippings etc from corrupted memory cards in simplified way.
[read more]

item.title: Thumb Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Thumb Drive Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: partitionrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Thumb Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Thumb drive data recovery application provides highly interactive graphical user interface for user to work effectively without need of technical knowledge. Data recovery software restores all types of files like jpeg, m4a, jpg, wav, mpeg, wma, doc, exe, 3gp, mp3, mp4, gif and many more. Thumb drive data software has capability to get back all files and folders that are permanently deleted and lost from flash drive.

[read more]
item.description:
Thumb Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Thumb drive data recovery application provides highly interactive graphical user interface for user to work effectively without need of technical knowledge. Data recovery software restores all types of files like jpeg, m4a, jpg, wav, mpeg, wma, doc, exe, 3gp, mp3, mp4, gif and many more. Thumb drive data software has capability to get back all files and folders that are permanently deleted and lost from flash drive.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Thumb Drive Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Thumb drive data recovery application provides highly interactive graphical user interface for user to work effectively without need of technical knowledge. Data recovery software restores all types of files like jpeg, m4a, jpg, wav, mpeg, wma, doc, exe, 3gp, mp3, mp4, gif and many more. Thumb drive data software has capability to get back all files and folders that are permanently deleted and lost from flash drive.

item.title: SIM Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: SIM Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: partitionrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
SIM Recovery Software
(Utilities)
SIM Recovery Software is available at company URL www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org for regaining accidentally deleted contact details from SIM. SIM data regaining tool recoups deleted data like sent SMS from SIM in convenient manner. Mobile phone SIM card information restoring utility is able to restore missing data such as contact numbers, sent messages etc from corrupted SIM card. Cell phone SIM data regaining program recovers lost data from SIM not detected by mobile phones.

[read more]
item.description:
SIM Recovery Software
(Utilities)
SIM Recovery Software is available at company URL www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org for regaining accidentally deleted contact details from SIM. SIM data regaining tool recoups deleted data like sent SMS from SIM in convenient manner. Mobile phone SIM card information restoring utility is able to restore missing data such as contact numbers, sent messages etc from corrupted SIM card. Cell phone SIM data regaining program recovers lost data from SIM not detected by mobile phones.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SIM Recovery Software
(Utilities)
SIM Recovery Software is available at company URL www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org for regaining accidentally deleted contact details from SIM. SIM data regaining tool recoups deleted data like sent SMS from SIM in convenient manner. Mobile phone SIM card information restoring utility is able to restore missing data such as contact numbers, sent messages etc from corrupted SIM card. Cell phone SIM data regaining program recovers lost data from SIM not detected by mobile phones.

[read more]

item.title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [Virtualization]
item.itunes:title: GAME DOMAIN - NRGD [Virtualization]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(Virtualization)
[h2] SHIZUKU INSTALLATION [/h2]
1. extract the GAME DOMAIN.zip file in /sdcard/ and Connect shizuku with wireless debuging

2. run shizuku with termux
sh /sdcard/GD/rish

3.Paste Following command

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/GD/GD64 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/GD64 && /data/local/tmp/GD64
[h3]32 bit installation [/h3]
rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/GD/GD32 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/GD32 && /data/local/tmp/GD32


[h2]Linux Installation[/h2]

Unzip the ZIP File:
unzip filename.zip
Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

cd extracted_folder
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
./GD32
For 64-bit systems:
./GD64

[h2]Windows Installation[/h2]
Extract the zip:
Use a tool like WinRAR, 7-Zip, or the built-in Windows tool to extract the contents of the APK file.
Open Command Prompt:

Press Win + R, type cmd, and press Enter.
Run the Installer:

For 32-bit systems:
bash GD32
For 64-bit systems:
bash GD64

[h2]Android Installation / BlissOS / Other Emulator Installation[/h2]
Open Magisk / Kernel SU:

Ensure you have Magisk or Kernel SU installed on your device or emulator.
Go to the Module Section:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.
Install the Module:

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.


The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

Game-Specific Kernel Tweaks: 30 Game Tweak Enhancements

GAME DOMAIN caters to a wide range of popular games, providing dedicated kernel tweaks to optimize your gaming sessions. Here are the 23 game-specific
GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation
Within LDPlayer, follow the steps outlined in the Android Installation section:

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.
[read more]
item.description:
GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(Virtualization)
[h2] SHIZUKU INSTALLATION [/h2]
1. extract the GAME DOMAIN.zip file in /sdcard/ and Connect shizuku with wireless debuging

2. run shizuku with termux
sh /sdcard/GD/rish

3.Paste Following command

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/GD/GD64 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/GD64 && /data/local/tmp/GD64
[h3]32 bit installation [/h3]

Navigate to the Extracted Folder:

Open the Magisk app and navigate to the Modules section.
Select the Module from Storage:

Tap on "Select from Storage" and choose the previously downloaded file.

After selecting the file, press "OK". The module will install itself.
Reboot the Device:

Once the installation is complete, reboot your device to finalize the installation.


The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Just as Domain Expansion signifies an overwhelming force, the GAME DOMAIN module brings an unparalleled gaming experience to your Android device.

GAME DOMAIN ensures that each game receives specific optimizations tailored to its requirements. Whether you're battling in the intense landscapes of PUBG Mobile, exploring the fantastical realm of Genshin Impact, or racing through the tracks of Real Racing, this module has you covered.

Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.

[h2]Virtualisation Installation[/h2]
Step 1: Open LDPlayer,android studio or other simulation
Ensure LDPlayer, an Android emulator, is installed on your computer. Open LDPlayer to begin the process.

Step 2: Follow Android Installation

Open Magisk or KernelSU within the emulator.
Navigate to the Modules section.
Select the module from storage.
Install the module.
Reboot the virtual device within LDPlayer.

GAME DOMAIN - NRGD
(Virtualization)

1. extract the GAME DOMAIN.zip file in /sdcard/ and Connect shizuku with wireless debuging

2. run shizuku with termux

3.Paste Following command

rm -rf /data/local/tmp/* && cp /sdcard/GD/GD64 /data/local/tmp && chmod +x /data/local/tmp/GD64 && /data/local/tmp/GD64
[h3]32 bit installation [/h3]

The GAME DOMAIN Magisk Module which No Root users can use with shizuku , developed by revWhiteShadow, is a tribute to the anime world's dynamic power moves, inspired by Jujutsu Kaisen's "Domain Expansion." Revitalize your gaming sessions with GAME DOMAIN and experience the power of dedicated kernel tweaks that enhance performance, graphics, and overall gameplay. Elevate your gaming to the next level and embrace the Domain Expansion of your Android gaming experience.

item.title: Restore USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore USB Drive [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoreusbdrive1
item.itunes:summary:
Restore USB Drive
(Utilities)
Most competitive USB Drive Restore software is recommended by www.restoreusbdrive.com for retrieving crucial media files, textual documents and party photographs data which were lost from virus/worm attacks, disk failure, improper device handling.
[read more]
item.description:
Restore USB Drive
(Utilities)
Most competitive USB Drive Restore software is recommended by www.restoreusbdrive.com for retrieving crucial media files, textual documents and party photographs data which were lost from virus/worm attacks, disk failure, improper device handling.
[read more]

Restore USB Drive
(Utilities)
Most competitive USB Drive Restore software is recommended by www.restoreusbdrive.com for retrieving crucial media files, textual documents and party photographs data which were lost from virus/worm attacks, disk failure, improper device handling.

item.title: Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: partitionrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org offers affordable Partition Recovery Software to revive formatted digital pictures, images, video clips, mp3 songs, official documents and other multimedia files from storage media. File repairing utility provides facility to restore erased data lost due to improper device handling, logical error, power fault, human mistake, operating system failure or any other data loss reason. Data recovery utility is capable to regain lost data from empty recycle bin folders.

[read more]
item.description:
Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org offers affordable Partition Recovery Software to revive formatted digital pictures, images, video clips, mp3 songs, official documents and other multimedia files from storage media. File repairing utility provides facility to restore erased data lost due to improper device handling, logical error, power fault, human mistake, operating system failure or any other data loss reason. Data recovery utility is capable to regain lost data from empty recycle bin folders.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
www.partitionrecoverysoftware.org offers affordable Partition Recovery Software to revive formatted digital pictures, images, video clips, mp3 songs, official documents and other multimedia files from storage media. File repairing utility provides facility to restore erased data lost due to improper device handling, logical error, power fault, human mistake, operating system failure or any other data loss reason. Data recovery utility is capable to regain lost data from empty recycle bin folders.

[read more]

item.title: Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Partition Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: partitionrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Are you looking for an application that helps in retrieving formatted data from various data storage devices? Use cost efficient Partition Recovery Software which is widely used to recoup deleted files and folders from damaged computer hard disk without requiring any technical details or knowledge. USB drive data regaining utility is capable to restore missing multimedia files like images, photographs, pictures, audios, videos, movies, songs, wallpapers, graphics etc from pen drive instantly.

[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
Are you looking for an application that helps in retrieving formatted data from various data storage devices? Use cost efficient Partition Recovery Software which is widely used to recoup deleted files and folders from damaged computer hard disk without requiring any technical details or knowledge. USB drive data regaining utility is capable to restore missing multimedia files like images, photographs, pictures, audios, videos, movies, songs, wallpapers, graphics etc from pen drive instantly.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Partition Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Are you looking for an application that helps in retrieving formatted data from various data storage devices? Use cost efficient Partition Recovery Software which is widely used to recoup deleted files and folders from damaged computer hard disk without requiring any technical details or knowledge. USB drive data regaining utility is capable to restore missing multimedia files like images, photographs, pictures, audios, videos, movies, songs, wallpapers, graphics etc from pen drive instantly.

[read more]

item.title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:title: BusyTasks [System Monitoring]
item.itunes:author: unknown-spirit
item.itunes:summary:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]
item.description:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
BusyTasks
(System Monitoring)
[b]Side (and sad) note:[/b]
In contrast to Unix, Windows is very obsessed with marking my program as malware. Of course, it is not. You may have to add BusyTasks to the list of exceptions in Microsoft Defender Antivirus before starting it.

This program uses several command line tools to receive its input. Please read the manual (see files) before installation!
Moreover, I'd be very grateful for any kind of feedback.

Isn't everything some kind of process? At least on a computer it is. So let's keep an eye on them. This program is a revival of my [URL=https://www.gnome-look.org/p/1002049/]BusyTasks plasmoid for the KDE4 desktop[/URL]. Due to several issues with KDE5 I decided to switch to java and give it one more chance to live and prosper there. It uses several programs to get its input. The collected data is neither unique nor new, but the idea to clearly sum it up in one single program is. This task monitor displays up to four different tasks, each with different priority.
BusyTasks is only useful if it is always visible (e.g. residing on a panel) If you had got to minimize windows or show the desktop to have a glance on it you could equally start the system monitor.
I recommend splitting up the taskbar, putting it in between and setting it up as a scheduled task.

The Linux version for java is outdated, I recommend using my KDE Plasmoid called [url=https://www.pling.com/find?search=BusyTasks]BusyTasksPlasmoid[/url].
For the moment this program is only released for Windows.
[read more]

item.title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: xeesan
item.itunes:summary:
Something for Poco F3/Redmi k40/Mi 11x
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
a fork of AOSPA, with extra features and a brand new design
Like a asteroid or a minor planet orbiting around AOSPA
SomethingOS do not pretend to be better than any other, take that fits you the best and if you decide to install Something, thank you !
[read more]
